perks.text: Replace one -1 card with one +1 card
Replace one -1 card with one +0 {wound} card
Replace one +0 card with one +1 {immobilize} card
Replace one +0 card with one "Place this card in your active area. On your next attack, discard this card to add +2 {attack}" {rolling} card
Replace two +1 cards with two +2 cards
Whenever you short rest, you may spend one unspent {spent} item for no effect to {recover} a different spent item
At the start of your first turn each scenario, you may perform {move} 3
Whenever you would gain {immobilize}, prevent the condition

masteries: Declare Fast for seven consecutive rounds
Never be targeted by an attack
